headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Knicks move to -500; Anunoby in hunt for MVP

headlines.headline: Jonathon Cooper arrested again, allegedly violated protection order
headlines.description: Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper was arrested Thursday after he allegedly violated a protection order against him, according to jail records.

headlines.headline: Felony assault charge added against Broncos LB Jonathon Cooper
headlines.description: Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper is facing two additional charges, including a felony charge of second-degree assault, stemming from his arrest last week, according to court records.

headlines.headline: Sources: No league discipline for Chiefs DBs coach Merritt
headlines.description: The NFL has concluded its investigation of Kansas City Chiefs defensive backs coach Dave Merritt and found insufficient evidence of a violation of the personal conduct policy, sources told NFL Network's Mike Garafolo.

headlines.headline: 2027 NFL draft: Ranking top five prospects at every position
headlines.description: The NFL draft is a long way off, but Matt Miller and Jordan Reid ranked the five best prospects at every position. How do the top QBs, OTs, CBs and more stack up?

headlines.headline: NFL players make World Cup predictions, weigh in on USMNT
headlines.description: We asked 29 NFL players to weigh in on who would win the Golden Boot and World Cup and also how the United States would fare.

headlines.headline: PWHL's Minnesota Frost re-signs Stecklein, Zumwinkle
headlines.description: Defender Lee Stecklein and forward Grace Zumwinkle are staying put in Minnesota after the PWHL's Frost re-signed both players on Friday.
